Subject: The Food That Built America - When the Chips Are Down
Description: As C.E. Doolin and Herman Lay try to control the chips business in the 1950s, their success inspires one of the biggest companies in the world to design a strong, saddle-shaped chip and a revolutionary container to ship them in.

Subject: The Food That Built America - American Cheese
Description: At the turn of the 20th century, James Kraft challenges thousands of years of cheese-making tradition and forever alters the dairy industry with his new cheese innovation; the Pabst brothers are desperate to keep their successful beer empire solvent.

Subject: The Food That Built America - All American Marinara
Description: Food conglomerate Campbell's kickstarts what will become an Italian American food revolution, launching SpaghettiOs and then Prego and along the way, transforming everything from home cooking to casual dining.

Subject: The Food That Built America - Pasta Party
Description: Hector and Mario Boiardi open an Italian restaurant in Cleveland in 1924 and soon introduce Italian food to Americans; the brothers eventually find themselves in competition with James Kraft and his newest offering, macaroni and cheese.

Subject: The Food That Built America - Pizza Wars
Description: In the 1950's, two brothers from Wichita, Kan., aim to build their restaurant, Pizza Hut, by introducing America to Italian dish-pizza; Americans soon fall in love with their pizza, but rival, Domino's, threatens to derail their success.

Subject: The Food That Built America - Beer Necessities
Description: A German immigrant looks to revolutionize the American beer industry when he's handed a struggling brewery; his signature beer will go on to amass sales of over 11 billion dollars a year.

Subject: The Food That Built America - Asian Food Invasion
Description: A down-on-his-luck Japanese businessman and a Chinese immigrant and her son change the American palette when they introduce instant noodles in a cup, Peking Duck, and a big Chinese restaurant chain in the nation.

Subject: The Food That Built America - The Colonel
Description: Kentucky gas station owner, Harland Sanders, develops a new method for making fried chicken, drawing customers from far and wide.

Subject: The Food That Built America - Burger Empire: The Ray Kroc Story
Description: In the 1950s, middle-aged salesman Ray Kroc is drowning in debt when he's inspired by a roadside burger stand he wants to spread nationwide, McDonald's; he creates the modern model of franchising and ignites a fast-food gold rush.

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Mad Medicine

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Perilous Play

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Precarious Products
Description: The everyday products that are way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye; what were the most ill-advised and risky household products?

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Occupational Hazards
Description: Uncovering the downright dangerous gigs of the past, from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys and projectionists fleeing fiery blazes.

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Spectacular Stunts
Description: A wild journey into the world of vintage daredevils who risked it all for a rush; from the enigmatic Human Fly to skateboard speed demons and diving horses, these stunts are as reckless as they are unforgettable.

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Very Extreme Sports
Description: The modern concept of extreme sports is a product of marketing, but back in the old days, the lack of rules made them truly extreme; from bone-crushing football and deadly baseball games to wild events like auto polo.

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Treacherous Travel
Description: Exploding cars and blimp disasters to kids sent through the mail and doomed personal helicopters; the past is packed with travel tales and the misfires that paved the road to modern transportation.

Subject: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler - Food Fiascos
Description: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past; from radioactive energy drinks, to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, to the additives in your milk and bread, uncovering the things people once ate without a second thought.

Subject: Ancient Aliens: Origins - Extraterrestrial Devices (Alien Technology)
Description: The Antikythera Mechanism, an ancient Greek astronomical device retrieved from a shipwreck, is the world's oldest known analog computer; its discovery sparks debate about the technological capabilities attributed to ancient civilizations.

Subject: Ancient Aliens - The Visionaries
Description: Theorists suggest that extraterrestrials have been communicating with mathematicians and engineers through the universal language of mathematics and binary code, influencing Nikolai Fyodorov and other visionaries to advocate for space exploration.

Subject: Ancient Aliens - The Wisdom Keepers
Description: In Australia, Aboriginal people tell sacred stories about sky gods visiting Earth in fire-spewing crafts and ``seeding`` the planet.

Description: Theorists suggest that some extraterrestrials may closely resemble animals, as evidenced by gods depicted with animal traits; researchers suggest that some animals may have been planted here by aliens as part of an experiment to shape life on Earth.

Subject: Ancient Aliens - Area 52
Description: A look at whether or not Area 51's notoriety acts as a cover-up to much bigger, top-secret extraterrestrial experiments taking place at multiple locations.

Subject: Ancient Aliens - Egypt's Giant Tombs
Description: Deep beneath the sands of Egypt lie 24 enormous sarcophagi, and every one of them is empty; discussing what purpose those giant tombs had served.

Subject: Ancient Aliens - The UFO Superhighway

Description: An investigation reveals a strange plot when a professional tennis player's wrist is broken after she finishes a practice session with a former rival.

Subject: The Shining (1980)
Description: A writer goes mad while serving as caretaker with his wife and clairvoyant son at a snowbound Colorado hotel.

Subject: Misery (1990)
Description: An author (James Caan) recovers from an accident, nursed by a twisted fan (Kathy Bates) who insists he write a new book just for her.

Subject: Silver Bullet (1985)
Description: A boy (Corey Haim) in a wheelchair stops a werewolf with his uncle (Gary Busey) and sister (Megan Follows).

Subject: Christine (1983)
Description: When a gawky teen (Keith Gordon) restores a 1958 Plymouth Fury, the car takes on a life of its own and begins terrorizing those in its way.

Subject: Creepshow (1982)
Description: Five Stephen King tales inspired by 1950s comic books include a nagged professor (Hal Holbrook) and a tycoon (E.G. Marshall) with cockroaches.

Subject: Tales From the Darkside: The Movie (1990)
Description: A doomed boy stalls a witch (Deborah Harry) with three tales: ``Lot 249,`` ``Cat From Hell`` and ``Lover's Vow.``

Subject: Law & Order - Old Friends
Description: Stone contemplates resigning when the mob retaliates against his prosecution of a member of a notorious crime family.

Subject: Law & Order - Second Opinion
Description: A doctor is charged with murder for prescribing a treatment that caused toxic fumes to emit from a breast-cancer patient's body.

Subject: Law & Order - Coma
Description: Kincaid and McCoy have to decide whether to risk killing a comatose woman to recover the bullet they need as evidence.

Subject: Law & Order - Blue Bamboo
Description: A young actress claiming to have been the victim of a white slavery ring becomes the prime suspect when a wealthy Japanese businessman is murdered.

Subject: Law & Order - Family Values
Description: After the body of a wealthy woman is found in the East River, her daughter and her husband become murder suspects.

Subject: Law & Order - White Rabbit
Description: A safe-deposit-box company eventually exposes a political activist who went underground 20 years earlier to avoid a murder charge.

Subject: Law & Order - Competence
Description: Briscoe, Logan, McCoy and Kincaid try to clear Van Buren's name after she shoots a pair of young men who accost her at an automated teller machine.

Subject: Bones - The Survivor in the Soap
Description: The team investigates the death of a young man whose remains were found at a hazardous waste disposal facility; Cam and Arastoo struggle to keep their relationship secret; Brennan and Booth try to decide where to take their vacation.

Subject: Bones - The Doom in the Gloom
Description: The investigation into the death of a former Marine leads the team to a group obsessed with preparing for the apocalypse; Sweets finds an apartment.

Subject: Bones - The Blood From the Stones
Description: The team investigates when an undercover cop turns up dead with a bag of diamonds inside his body; Brennan struggles to be likable as the subject of a documentary film.

Subject: Bones - The Maiden in the Mushrooms
Description: The team investigates when a TV producer is murdered; Christine is accused of biting a classmate; Hodgins uses his tools at the Jeffersonian to chemically re-create Finn's hot sauce.

Subject: Bones - The Party in the Pants
Description: The team investigates when a stock broker -- who moonlights as a stripper -- is murdered; after a 24-year absence, Booth's mother (Joanna Cassidy) shows up with a request.

Subject: Bones - The Pathos in the Pathogens
Description: The team tries to prevent a viral outbreak during an investigation into a journalist's murder, whose infected body is found at a biohazard facility; when Arastoo Vaziri is affected by the mutated virus, the only way to save him is to solve the case.

Subject: Insidious: The Last Key (2018)
Description: Parapsychologist Elise Rainier and her team travel to Five Keys, N.M., to investigate a claim of a haunting in her childhood home. She must soon confront and destroy her greatest fear, the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

Subject: Tales From the Darkside: The Movie (1990)
Description: A doomed boy stalls a witch (Deborah Harry) with three tales: ``Lot 249,`` ``Cat From Hell`` and ``Lover's Vow.``

Subject: House on Haunted Hill (1999)
Description: A theme-park mogul (Geoffrey Rush) invites five guests to an abandoned asylum and offers $1 million to anyone who stays there all night.

Subject: House of Wax (2005)
Description: Friends (Elisha Cuthbert, Chad Michael Murray) become stranded in a town where murderous twins entomb their victims in wax.

Subject: I Know What You Did Last Summer (1997)
Description: A killer stalks North Carolina teens (Jennifer Love Hewitt, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Ryan Phillippe) who disposed of an auto accident's live victim.

Subject: Law & Order - Precious
Description: A girl found dead in a cooler may have been the victim of parents suffering from an unusual psychological illness.

Subject: Law & Order - Virtue
Description: McCoy and Kincaid find themselves in a unique situation when a high-powered city attorney accuses a city councilman of sexual harassment.

Subject: Law & Order - Scoundrels
Description: A corporate raider is linked to the murder of a sleazy lawyer who planned a class action suit against him.

Subject: Law & Order - House Counsel
Description: A juror bribed to throw the trial of a crime boss is murdered; the mobster's attorney is arrested for the crime.

Subject: Law & Order - Guardian
Description: When a wealthy socialite's estranged daughter is killed, the detectives are led to the accountant responsible for the young woman's trust fund.

Subject: Law & Order - Progeny
Description: Kincaid and McCoy are determined to convict both the man who shot an abortion doctor and the activist whose rhetoric may have encouraged the incident.

Subject: Law & Order - Rage
Description: The probe of a Wall Street executive's murder leads to a top broker who has a history of criminal behavior.

Subject: Planet Earth - Ocean Deep
Description: Time lapse footage taken from 2,000m down captures eels, crabs and isopods.

Subject: Eden: Untamed Planet - Alaska: Last American Frontier
Description: In southeast Alaska, there's an ice-bound Eden that harbors possibly the richest temperate rainforests of all.

Subject: The Cabin in the Woods (2011)
Description: Two unseen scientists manipulate the gory goings-on at a backwoods cabin inhabited by a group of unsuspecting college friends (Kristen Connolly, Chris Hemsworth, Anna Hutchison).

Subject: Cabin Fever (2002)
Description: College students (Jordan Ladd, James DeBello, Rider Strong) fall prey to a flesh-eating virus after they head to the woods for a vacation.

Subject: Friday the 13th, Part 2 (1981)
Description: Mrs. Voorhees' son Jason is waiting when another load of teens (Amy Steel, John Furey, Adrienne King) tries to make a buck at Camp Crystal.

Subject: House of Wax (2005)
Description: Friends (Elisha Cuthbert, Chad Michael Murray) become stranded in a town where murderous twins entomb their victims in wax.

Subject: I Know What You Did Last Summer (1997)
Description: A killer stalks North Carolina teens (Jennifer Love Hewitt, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Ryan Phillippe) who disposed of an auto accident's live victim.

Subject: Scream 4 (2011)
Description: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott (Neve Campbell) arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

Subject: Jeepers Creepers (2001)
Description: A cloaked figure (Jonathan Breck) terrorizes two siblings (Gina Philips, Justin Long) after they discover mutilated bodies in a country drainpipe.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Hanley Waters
Description: The team must investigate targeted killings in Florida while each member is dealing with feelings about losing Prentiss.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Stranger
Description: A stalker in San Diego targets college students; Strauss scrutinizes the team after the loss of Prentiss.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Out of the Light
Description: The team travels to a North Carolina town where one woman was found badly injured and another is missing, and discovers those may not be the only victims.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Big Sea
Description: The team investigates when bodies are found buried beneath the ocean floor off Florida; Morgan is rattled when his aunt thinks her missing daughter is one of the victims.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Supply & Demand
Description: The team investigates a suspected human trafficking ring; Hotchner suggests changes are coming; J.J. returns to the team.

Subject: Criminal Minds - It Takes a Village
Description: A Senate committee questions the members of the BAU team; a familiar face may help keep the team united.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Proof
Description: The BAU team investigates a series of murders in Oklahoma; Reid gives JJ and Prentiss the cold shoulder.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Ants in the Pantry
Description: The boys work as exterminators.

Subject: NCIS - Broken Arrow
Description: Dinozzo's father (Robert Wagner) returns and plays an important role in a murder investigation.

Subject: NCIS - Enemies Foreign
Description: The team must protect Ziva's father when his attendance at a convention leads to surprises.

Subject: NCIS - Enemies Domestic
Description: Following a deadly attack, one member of the team reminisces.

Subject: NCIS - False Witness
Description: A Naval petty officer and sole witness in an upcoming murder trial disappears.

Subject: NCIS - Ships in the Night
Description: The team partners with a Coast Guard Investigative Service agent to solve the murder of a Marine on a dinner boat.

Subject: NCIS - Recruited
Description: Dr. Mallard's predecessor, Dr. Magnus, joins the team to help solve a murder at a college fair.

Subject: The Dead Zone (1983)
Description: A man (Christopher Walken) comes out of a coma able to see the probable futures of anyone he touches.

Subject: Pet Sematary (1989)
Description: A family's life in small-town Maine is shattered by the evil unleashed from an ancient American Indian burial ground.

Subject: Silver Bullet (1985)
Description: A boy (Corey Haim) in a wheelchair stops a werewolf with his uncle (Gary Busey) and sister (Megan Follows).

Subject: An American Werewolf in London (1981)
Description: A New York student (David Naughton) becomes the scourge of London after being bitten by a beast on the moors.

Subject: The Lost Boys (1987)
Description: A woman and her sons move to a coastal California town for a fresh start, unaware that it is full of teenage vampire punks.

Subject: Insidious: The Last Key (2018)
Description: Parapsychologist Elise Rainier and her team travel to Five Keys, N.M., to investigate a claim of a haunting in her childhood home. She must soon confront and destroy her greatest fear, the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

Subject: 28 Days Later (2002)
Description: Survivors (Cillian Murphy, Noah Huntley, Naomie Harris) try to stay a step ahead of vicious, virus-infected humans that have overrun London.

Subject: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet - The Blue Planet
Description: Oceans dominate the world's weather systems while supporting a wide range of life.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - Amazon
Description: The diversity of the Amazon and the strategies used by the jungle life to make the most of limited nutrients.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - Galapagos
Description: Bizarre and unique creatures inhabit the Galapagos islands.

Subject: Bones - The Friend in Need
Description: As the team investigates the death of a seemingly innocent 15-year-old boy, they learn that he was involved in illegal activity.

Subject: Bones - The Shot in the Dark
Description: While in the hospital after being shot at the lab, Brennan struggles with visions of her mother that defy her usual logic; evidence may link Brennan's attacker to the Jeffersonian.

Subject: Bones - The Doll in the Derby
Description: When a female roller derby skater is killed and dismembered, Angie goes under cover to help solve the case; Cam tries to learn more about Booth's secretive hospital appointments.

Subject: Bones - The Twist in the Plot
Description: The team investigates when two bodies are found at the same burial plot; Brennan and Booth discuss after-death arrangements; Daisy returns for the first time since the breakup.

Subject: ACC Huddle
Description: Host Taylor Tannebaum and analysts Jimbo Fisher, Eddie Royal and Eric Mac Lain go on the road each week to preview the slate of ACC football games. Live from campus of the ACC's marquee game of the week.

Subject: College Football - Boston College at Pittsburgh
Description: The Eagles (1-3, 0-2 ACC) visit the Panthers (2-2, 0-1). Boston College won the last head-to-head meeting in 2024, but Pittsburgh took the latest clash in Pennsylvania in 2023. Eli Holstein (PITT) has thrown for 1,050 yards and 11 TDs in 2025.

Subject: College Football - Syracuse at SMU
Description: The Orange go up against the Mustangs for the first time since 1932. Syracuse had its three-game win streak snapped with a 38-3 home loss to Duke on Sept. 27. SMU quarterback Kevin Jennings has totaled six touchdowns across two home games in 2025.

Subject: College Football - Miami at Florida State
Description: The No. 3 Hurricanes visit the No. 18 Seminoles. Miami leads the rivalry series 36-33 after beating Florida State 36-14 in 2024. FSU is coming off a double-overtime loss to Virginia on Sept. 26. Miami last played Sept. 20, beating Florida 26-7.

Subject: College Football - Nevada at Fresno State

Subject: National Ball Hockey League
Description: Lace up your shoes and hit the rink -- it's hockey like you've never seen it. Catch the fast-paced action of Tier 1 New Jersey teams in the National Ball Hockey League!

Subject: National Putting Tour American Dream's Super Roll of Putting
2025 NuLu Bock Fest Goat Racing Championships
Description: NuLu Bock Fest Goat Racing brings new life to a quirky, historic Louisville tradition, once born from travelers racing goats through alleyways as they waited to cross the Ohio River. Ready. Set. Goat!

Subject: 2025 T-Rex World Championship Races
Description: It's a race of prehistoric proportion as men, women, children and seniors compete to be the 2025 T-Rex World Champion!

Subject: 2025 Corgi Races at Emerald Downs
Description: Get ready for the cutest and most unpredictable event of the year as over 100 Corgis race for the Championship trophy!

Subject: 2025 World Dog Surfing Championships Best Waves
Description: The World Dog Surfing Championships Best Waves competition rewards the best waves, champion dog surfers have surfed over the past year.

Subject: 11th Annual Outhouse Races
Description: Teams build their own custom outhouses -- each equipped with a mandatory toilet seat for the driver and a roll within reach. One outhouse races another, with teams straining to push their rig across the finish line and be crowned Fastest Throne.

Subject: Roofball - 2025 RFA Cup
Description: Players from around the country compete for Roofball's RFA Cup championship. Played in Lancaster,Ohio, at the first roof ever purpose-built for the game.

Subject: The 2024 Onewheel World Championship - Race For The Rail
Description: The World Championship Onewheel Racing event featured the best Onewheel riders zooming down Sky Tavern Ski Mountain in a boardercross style event for $10,000. This race took place outside of Reno, Nevada on August 9th, 2024.

Subject: 2025 NESSBIC Finals
Description: Top pinball players from across New England compete to take home the Speedy Silver Ball crown.

Subject: 2025 Golden Tee Golf World Championships
Description: The world's best Golden Tee players converge at the Palms Casino Resort in Las Vegas to battle for nearly $200,000 in prizes. The stakes are high, the legends are ready -- who will take home the title in the game that helped shape esports?

Subject: IWL Wrestball 3x3
Description: The explosive fusion of basketball, rugby, and wrestling -- where agility, power, and strategy collide. Be the first to experience this new-rules-arena revolution.

Subject: Battle Court Jai-Alai Championship VII
Description: Battle Court VII is the most highly anticipated Jai-Alai event of the year.The World Jai-Alai League's Championship game features Udonis Haslem's two-time title holders, The Renegades, versus the newest expansion team in the League, The Fireballs.

Subject: Swiss Stone Tossing
Description: Contestants grunt and hurl earth-shaped stones in their natural state -- no polish, no shine. The furthest legal toss without crossing the line takes the win. It's simple, primal, and strangely satisfying.

Subject: Mailboat Jumping
Description: Carriers compete to secure a spot on the historic Mailboat Team, jumping from boat to dock and back again while in motion. It's part timing, part chaos,and a century-old tradition that defines summer. Don't fall in-or do, but don't expect sympathy.

Subject: 2025 National Bubble Gum Blowing Championship
Description: Finalists chew. They blow. They pray it doesn't pop too soon. The biggest unburst bubble wins. One gum blower will be crowned the 2025 Champion. The rest go home sticky and defeated.

Subject: FlingGolf: LFC-5 Longest FlingShot Championship
Description: With FlingSticks and golf balls, top World League FlingGolf Pros battle to outdistance each other and take home the LFC Belt.

Subject: The Goodyear Blimp Sky Race of the Century
Description: To mark the 100th anniversary of the Goodyear Blimp in 2025, Goodyear brought all three of its U.S. airships to Akron, Ohio for the Sky Race of the Century. While blimps aren't known for speed, this race has no shortage of action.

Subject: Diving Chess: Duel in the Depths
Description: Two champions face off in a high-stakes underwater chess match -- where every move is made on a single breath.

Subject: Freestyle Chess Grand Slam - Paris Final: Best Of Show
Description: ESPN8 presents highlights from the epic final between Magnus Carlsen and Hikaru Nakamura in Paris -- featuring key moments, tactics, emotions, interviews, and the intensity of this groundbreaking chess format.

Subject: World Series of Armwrestling Finals Season 3
Description: The World Series of Armwrestling brings the top arm wrestlers around the US to compete for over $100,000 in cash and prizes in the largest cash tournament in the world!

Subject: 360 Hoops Championship
Description: Watch the Great American Events on ESPN.

Subject: Padel Ping Pong Championship
Description: A mixture of Ping Pong and Squash, this innovative sport creates a creative blend of hand eye coordination, power and finesse. It's the Padel Ping Pong Championship, two on two competition from the sport's birthplace in Sweden.

Subject: UFC 320: Ankalaev vs. Pereira 2 - Prelims

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part One (1930-1959)

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Two (1960-1970)

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Three (1971-1979)

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Four (1980-1989)

Description: Two of three remaining unbeaten teams in the NFC clash as Tampa Bay hosts Philadelphia. The Eagles erased a 19-point second-half deficit, punctuated by Jordan Davis' TD off a blocked winning field-goal try, for a 33-26 win over the Rams in Week 3.

Subject: NFL Football - Minnesota Vikings vs. Pittsburgh Steelers
Description: The Vikings and Steelers cross the Atlantic to contest a game at Croke Park in Dublin. The Rooney family that owns the Pittsburgh franchise is well-known for their Irish roots, with the clan having emigrated from Newry, County Down in the 1840s.

Description: The No. 12 Bulldogs (3-1, 1-1 SEC) try to continue their mastery of the Wildcats (2-2, 0-2) with a 16th straight victory. Georgia tries to bounce back after a 24-21 loss to Alabama. Seth McGowan (UK) boasts 387 rushing yards and seven touchdowns.

Description: From Audrey J. Walton Stadium at Vernon Kennedy Field in Warrensburg, Mo.

Subject: College Football - Mississippi State at Texas A&M
Description: The Bulldogs visit the No. 6 Aggies. Texas A&M is 4-0 for the first time since 2016 after outlasting Auburn 16-10 in Week 5. Le'Veon Moss (TA&M) ran for 139 yards and a TD. Mississippi State comes off an overtime loss to then-No. 15 Tennessee.

Subject: College Football - Kent State at Oklahoma
Description: The No. 5 Sooners host the Golden Flashes. Oklahoma quarterback John Mateer, an early Heisman Trophy candidate, had surgery for a broken bone in his right hand Sept. 25, and will miss up to a month. Michael Hawkins Jr. starts at QB for the Sooners.

Subject: College Football - Vanderbilt at Alabama
Description: The No. 16 Commodores (5-0, 1-0 SEC) vie for their first win streak against the No. 10 Crimson Tide (3-1, 1-0) since 1956. Vanderbilt snapped a 23-game series slide with a 40-35 victory in 2024. Alabama won at then-No. 5 Georgia 24-21 in Week 5.
